heading: Waiver for sanctioned officials that recognize the Interim President of Venezuela
label: 9722 Waiver for sanctioned officials that recognize the Interim President of Venezuela

children.heading: Removal of sanctions
children.label: a Removal of sanctions
children.text: If a person sanctioned under any of the provisions of law described in subsection (b) recognizes and pledges supports for the Interim President of Venezuela or a subsequent democratically elected government, the person shall no longer be subject to such sanctions, pursuant to such procedures as the Secretary of State and the Secretary of the Treasury may establish to implement this section.

children.label: A
children.text: Paragraphs (3) and (4) of section 5(a) of the Venezuela Defense of Human Rights and Civil Society Act of 2014 (), as amended by .Public Law 113–278section 163 of this title1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: B
children.text: Paragraph (5) of section 5(a) of such Act, to the extent such paragraph relates to the sanctions described in paragraph (3) or (4) of such subsection.11

children.label: A
children.text: Clauses (1) and (4) of section 1(a)(ii)(A) of Executive Order 13692 ( note).50 U.S.C. 1701

children.label: B
children.text: Subparagraph (D)(2) of section 1(a)(ii) of such Executive Order, to the extent such subparagraph relates to the provisions of law cited in subparagraph (A).

children.label: B
children.text: Paragraph (iii) of section 1(a) of such Executive Order, to the extent such paragraph relates to the provision of law cited in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Rulemaking
children.label: c Rulemaking
children.text: The President shall issue such regulations, licenses, and orders as may be necessary to carry out this section.
